properties.Desc: Arang Kel  is a village and tourist spot in the Neelam valley of Azad Kashmir. It is located on the hilltop above Kel at an altitude of 8,379 feet (2,554 m).

Dhanni waterfall is located in Panjkot village, Muzaffarabad district, of Azad Kashmir, Pakistan. The estimate terrain elevation above sea level is 1517 meters. Area is located at the banks of the Jhelum and the Neelum rivers, and is very hilly.
Gulpur Mahuli waterfall is a 110 km and a 3.5 hours drive from Islamabad.

Neelam Valley is a 144 km long bow-shaped valley in Azad Kashmir Region. The Neelam River valley has excellent scenic beauty, panoramic views; towering hills on both sides of the noisy Neelum River, lush green forests, enchanting streams and attractive s

Ratti Gali Lake is an alpine glacial lake which is located in Neelum Valley, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan . The lake is located at an altitude of 3,683 metres (12,083 ft). The lake is fed by the surrounding glacier waters of the mountains.
Rawalakot is one of the most beautiful valleys of KASHMIR which is located 80 km away from Rawalpindi and Islamabad. Rawalakot is famous by the name of "PEARL VALLEY" its specialty is natural beauty.
